questions.hindi: दो और तीन जोड़ने पर पाँच होता है।
options: Their average height is five feet.
The perimeter of the garden is one hundred metres.
Subtracting four from ten leaves six.
Adding two and three gives five.
questions.answer: Adding two and three gives five.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "दो और तीन जोड़ने पर पाँच होता है।" = "Adding two and three gives five."
Full sentence: "Subtracting four from ten leaves six."

questions.sentence: Multiplying three by four gives twelve yesterday.
options: Multiplying three by four gives twelve yesterday.
Multiplying three by four gives twelve.
questions.answer: Multiplying three by four gives twelve.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Multiplying three by four gives twelve."

questions.hindi: बीस को चार से भाग देने पर पाँच होता है।
options: Dividing twenty by four gives five.
questions.answer: Dividing twenty by four gives five.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "बीस को चार से भाग देने पर पाँच होता है।" = "Dividing twenty by four gives five."
Full sentence: "This is an even number."
Correct sentence: "Half is a fraction."

questions.hindi: उसे परीक्षा में नब्बे प्रतिशत अंक मिले।
options: The area of the room is twenty square metres.
Adding two and three gives five.
Their average height is five feet.
He got ninety percent marks in the exam.
questions.answer: He got ninety percent marks in the exam.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसे परीक्षा में नब्बे प्रतिशत अंक मिले।" = "He got ninety percent marks in the exam."
Full sentence: "Their average height is five feet."
Correct sentence: "A triangle has three sides."

questions.hindi: वर्ग की सभी भुजाएँ बराबर होती हैं।
options: Dividing twenty by four gives five.
All sides of a square are equal.
questions.answer: All sides of a square are equal.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वर्ग की सभी भुजाएँ बराबर होती हैं।" = "All sides of a square are equal."
Full sentence: "A circle has no sides."

questions.sentence: This equation are easy to solve.
options: This equation are easy to solve.
This equation is easy to solve.
questions.answer: This equation is easy to solve.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This equation is easy to solve."

questions.hindi: यह कोण नब्बे डिग्री का है।
options: He got ninety percent marks in the exam.
The area of the room is twenty square metres.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह कोण नब्बे डिग्री का है।" = "This angle is ninety degrees."

questions.sentence: The area of the _____ is twenty square metres.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "The area of the room is twenty square metres."

questions.sentence: The perimeter of the garden are one hundred metres.
options: The perimeter of the garden are one hundred metres.
The perimeter of the garden is one hundred metres.
questions.answer: The perimeter of the garden is one hundred metres.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The perimeter of the garden is one hundred metres."

options: Multiplying three by four gives twelve.
All sides of a square are equal.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "गणित मेरा पसंदीदा विषय है।" = "Maths is my favourite subject."
Full sentence: "He calculates quickly and correctly."

questions.hindi: हमें यह सवाल हल करना है।
options: We have to solve this problem.
questions.answer: We have to solve this problem.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हमें यह सवाल हल करना है।" = "We have to solve this problem."
